About

Kenyan data scientist
who ships real products.

I am a Kenyan data scientist and builder — the kind who does not wait for problems to be handed to him. I find them, dig into the data, and build something that fixes them.

I co-founded iLoop Technologies to tackle post-harvest loss in Kenya's fish supply chain. Using predictive modelling and real-time sensor data, iLoop tells farmers and cold-chain operators exactly when spoilage risk is rising — before it costs them. The same dashboard surfaces CO₂ savings data that has helped attract serious investor attention.

I built ProvenPath because the most capable people are often the least visible. It is a skills-assessment platform designed to fairly evaluate talent in underrepresented communities — replacing bias with data.

My latest project, Nexus Browser, takes my data and detection skills into gaming. It is an anti-cheat browser built to identify hackers in-game in real time — because fair competition should not be a luxury.

Across all three, the thread is the same: complex, messy data turned into systems that make things fairer, safer, and smarter.

Core Skills

Projects

Three problems.
Three real products.

Built from data up, deployed in the real world.

01
AgriTech · Cold Chain
iLoop Technologies

A predictive spoilage intelligence platform for Kenya's fish cold chain. Real-time sensor data feeds a model that alerts operators when spoilage risk is rising — before product is lost. The CO₂ savings dashboard has attracted serious investor attention and quantifies the climate case for cold-chain efficiency.

02
EdTech · Talent Equity
ProvenPath

A skills-assessment platform built to close the visibility gap for talent in underrepresented communities. ProvenPath replaces CV bias with structured, verifiable competency data — letting the most capable people prove their skills objectively, regardless of school, network, or background.

03
GameTech · Anti-cheat
Nexus Browser

An anti-cheat browser for competitive gaming. Nexus applies behavioural anomaly detection to in-game data streams, flagging cheating patterns in real time. Fair competition shouldn't be a luxury — this brings fraud-detection rigour into gaming integrity.

Live Pitch

Watch iLoop in action.

Our pitch walks through the cold-chain problem, the data model, and why iLoop's approach has attracted serious investor interest.

Data Science

The engine behind
the products.

Every product I build is grounded in real data problems. These analyses drive iLoop, ProvenPath, and Nexus — from predictive risk models to fairness metrics.

I work across the full pipeline — raw sensor ingestion, feature engineering, model training, and communicating findings to stakeholders who need clear decisions, not equations.

The African market context shapes everything: intermittent connectivity, noisy sensor hardware, low-resource environments where a model needs to be lightweight and explainable. That constraint makes the work more interesting and the solutions more robust.

Technical Approach
🔍
Data ingestion & cleaning
IoT streams, structured & unstructured normalisation
⚙️
Feature engineering
Time-series features, anomaly baselines, fairness-aware ML
📊
Dashboard & communication
Real-time risk UIs, investor CO₂ metrics, product analytics
🚀
Production deployment
Models shipped into real products with real users
